title: Artificial Intelligence Powered Pattern Search Engine
author: Pro_ambitious

comments.author: richardrich666
comments.body:
IMO both the robot trading & intraday pattern feed should be offered as demo for a week or two to see how it performs before asking people to throw another expense on their credit cards. 

everyone and their dog is pitching something that makes "trading easier" (lux algo anyone?) I just wish more of them would offer a trial. if it works I'm signing up right? trade ideas let me use their platform for 2 weeks and I was sold.

just my .02

replies.author: Pro_ambitious
replies.body:
Thanks for your feedback. That really makes sense for us. Will show that to CEO.

But let me notice, that Tickeron has 2 week trial period for all subscription products. Regarding robots - you are allowed to watch closed trades - which actually shows the performance efficiency of the product.

Please PM me if you need more details
